info.title: Maxwell Expenses API
info.description: Search and filter financial records for expense analysis

post.description: Search financial records using semantic search combined with optional filters. Use this when users ask about expenses, purchases, transactions, spending, or financial records.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search text for semantic matching against financial record descriptions

parameters.name: created_by_name
parameters.description: Filter by person name (partial match). Example: 'Mae' or 'Stefan'

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start of date range (ISO date). Defaults to 6 months ago

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End of date range (ISO date). Defaults to today

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sort order for results. Use 'date_desc' when the user asks for 'last', 'recent', 'latest', or 'newest' transactions. Use 'date_asc' for 'first' or 'earliest'. Use 'amount_desc' for 'most expensive' or 'largest'. Defaults to relevance ranking if omitted.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20)

200.description: Search results with matched financial records
